title: GAL Delegation Mandate
description: The enterprise OWNER's delegation of authority to the agent org: who DECIDES what, within what limit, escalating to whom; the bright-line set reserved to the owner. Enforced by `gal delegation route`. The mandate is INERT (every decision → owner) until the owner sets status: granted AND granted_by == owner. Booleans MUST be canonical true/false.

status.description: Only the owner flips this to granted.

granted_by.description: Must equal `owner` for the mandate to be live (the router enforces this).

mandate.description: The owner's risk envelope. Officers decide within these.

max_officer_spend_usd.description: An officer may authorize spend up to this; above → board → owner.

max_board_spend_usd.description: The board may authorize up to this; above = bet-the-company = owner.

authorities.description: Decision lanes. Each `decider` is an agent-officer (or the board).

owner_reserved.description: The bright line — always the owner, never delegable. Also force-detected by flags in the router.
